title: 5 Best and Worst Performing Real Estate Stocks in Q4 2022
text: High interest rates and a looming recession could make 2023 a challenging year for commercial real estate.

title: Storage REITs: Downsized Demand
text: Despite delivering the strongest earnings growth of any property sector in 2022, Self-Storage REITs have stumbled of late amid a post-pandemic demand normalization and pressure from elevated supply growth. Storage demand is driven largely by housing activity – specifically home sales and rental market turnover. Rental market turnover finished 2022 near historic-lows while home sales also dipped to decade-lows.

title: Extra Space Storage Inc. Announces Date of Earnings Release and Conference Call to Discuss 4th Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: SALT LAKE CITY , Jan. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Extra Space Storage Inc. (the "Company") (NYSE: EXR) announced today it will release financial results for the three months and full year ended December 31, 2022 on Wednesday, February 22, 2023 after the market closes. The Company will host a conference call at 1:00 p.m.

title: Storage Wars: May The Force Be With You
text: I've always liked the self-storage business due to its low capex requirement and the somewhat sticky customer mindset. Perhaps I'm biased because as my wife tells me “I'm a pack rat” and I tend to keep everything.

title: 10 January Inflation-Busting Ideal Dividend Dogs
text: March-April 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying dividends. Article titles were, '24 Pricing Power Performers' [UBS]; ‘7 REITS Raising Dividends' [KIP]; '10 Stocks for Rising Interest-Rates' [KIP]; ‘5 Stocks to Stave-off Sizzling Inflation' [KIP]; ‘6 Dividend Stocks Whip Inflation [Barron's]'.

title: My 6-Figure Market-Beating Dividend Growth Portfolio
text: As requested by many, I decided to dedicate an article to my personal dividend growth portfolio, consisting of more than 90% of my net worth. I start by explaining my strategy and approach, followed by a discussion of the benefits that come with dividend (growth) investment strategies.

title: 3 REITs Made For Dummies
text: The first REIT model wasn't developed with all of us in mind. The idea went all the way to Congress under the argument that commercial real estate investments should be available to the proverbial little guy.

title: Extra Space Storage: Need For Space
text: Extra Space Storage has been a beneficiary of the self-storage boom, which already started pre-pandemic. I like the business from a long-term positioning, but a reversal from a post-pandemic trend might be seen, given high rental growth in recent times and economic slowdown.
